pages.full_text:
__La Normandie__

[Printed tourist map of Normandy. Hand-drawn route traced in black ink over the map. Handwritten annotations:]
Camp [near Balleroy/Château area, with arrow]
Hotel [near Balleroy/Bayeux area]
Wild Camp [near Caen]
Camp [?Routrou] [near Falaise area]
pages.route_sketch_description: Hand-drawn route in black ink traced over a printed Normandy tourist map. Route appears to go from the ferry crossing (Portsmouth direction, top right) to Cherbourg area, then south along the west coast through Barneville-Carteret and Coutances, east through Saint-Lô toward Bayeux and Balleroy (labelled 'Camp' and 'Hotel'), then to Caen (labelled 'Wild Camp'), south toward Falaise (labelled 'Camp [?Routrou]'), and back north. Arrows and numbered attraction circles are part of the printed map.
pages.notes: This page is a printed tourist map of Normandy (La Normandie) with a hand-drawn route and handwritten campsite/hotel labels overlaid in black ink. The heading 'La Normandie' is handwritten in pink/magenta ink at the top and underlined. Handwritten labels on map: 'Camp' (near Balleroy/Château area), 'Hotel' (near Balleroy/Bayeux), 'Wild Camp' (near Caen), and what appears to be 'Camp Routrou' or 'Camp Routrou' near Falaise — the last word is uncertain, could be a campsite name. No handwritten page number visible. Year cannot be determined from this page alone; context from volume (1989–2003) and Normandy trip content suggests late 1990s or early 2000s but this cannot be confirmed from page content.

pages.full_text:
[Continuation of printed Normandy tourist map. Handwritten annotations:]
Camp [near Étretat/Fécamp area, top-left of this page]
Hotel [near Yvetot area, centre of page]
pages.route_sketch_description: Continuation of the hand-drawn route from the left page over the printed Normandy map. Route passes through the Étretat/Fécamp area (labelled 'Camp') and through the Yvetot/Seine valley area (labelled 'Hotel'), then continues toward Rouen and along the Seine. Small inset map in bottom-right corner shows Normandie region within France.
pages.notes: Continuation of the printed Normandy tourist map from the left page, with the same hand-drawn route and black ink annotations. Handwritten labels: 'Camp' near Étretat/Fécamp and 'Hotel' near Yvetot. Small France locator inset map printed in bottom-right corner. No handwritten page number visible. Year cannot be determined from this page alone.
